title: GUIScaleSplitter
description: Allows you to scale the GUI elements independently from each other
body:
This mod was originally created by [RedLime](https://modrinth.com/user/RedLime) and was updated to 1.21.11+ being maintained by the team behind [Gridlock](https://playgridlock.gg/)

## How does it work?

You can access the scale settings screen through the mod setting button in the Mod Menu.

![How it looks ingame when editing the scale](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/csCCTras/images/f49ead8cd7a7021d586b34c097466149a61a1313.png)

## Dependencies
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

## Credits
All credits for this mod go to [RedLime](https://modrinth.com/user/RedLime) and other contributors.
